SERVICE_INITIALIZED: VWO {service} initialized while creating an instance of SDK
EXPERIMENTS_EVALUATION_WHEN_ROLLOUT_PASS: Rollout rule got passed for user {userId}. Hence, evaluating experiments
EXPERIMENTS_EVALUATION_WHEN_NO_ROLLOUT_P: No Rollout rules present for the feature. Hence, checking experiment rules
USER_BUCKET_TO_VARIATION: User ID: {userId} for experiment: {campaignKey} having percent traffic: {percentTraffic} got bucket-value as {bucketValue} and hash-value as {hashValue}
IMPRESSION_FOR_TRACK_USER: Impression built for vwo_variationShown event for Account ID:{accountId}, User ID:{userId}, and experiment ID:{campaignId}
IMPRESSION_FOR_TRACK_GOAL: Impression built for {eventName} event for Account ID:{accountId}, and user ID:{userId}
IMPRESSION_FOR_SYNC_VISITOR_PROP: Impression built for {eventName} event for Account ID:{accountId}, and user ID:{userId}
NETWORK_CALL_FAILED: Error occurred while sending {method} request. Error: {err}
USER_IN_HOLDOUT_GROUP: User {userId} is in holdout group {holdoutGroupName} for feature {featureKey} - feature excluded
HOLDOUT_GROUP_EVALUATION: Evaluating holdout group {holdoutGroupId} for user {userId} and feature {featureId}
HOLDOUT_GROUP_BUCKETED: User {userId} bucketed into holdout group {holdoutGroupId} with bucket value {bucketValue} and threshold {threshold}
HOLDOUT_GROUP_FOUND_IN_STORAGE: Holdout group assignment found in storage for user {userId} in holdout group {holdoutName} for feature {featureKey}
HOLDOUT_FEATURE_ID_NULL: While evaluating holdouts, featureId = null, only checking global holdouts.
HOLDOUT_SEGMENTATION_FAIL: User: {userId} did not qualify segmentation for Holdout: {holdoutGroupName}
HOLDOUT_SHOULD_EXCLUDE_USER: User {userId} ({bucketValue}%) is in HOLDOUT named: {holdoutGroupName} with targeted traffic percent: {percentTraffic}% for feature with id: {featureId}.
HOLDOUT_SHOULD_NOT_EXCLUDE_USER: User {userId} is NOT part of HOLDOUT named {holdoutGroupName}.
HOLDOUT_NOT_CONFIGURED: Holdout configuration was not found in the received server settings.
HOLDOUT_SETTINGS_INVALID: Invalid value detected in holdout settings, review configuration in App
STORED_HOLDOUT_DECISION_FOUND: User id: {userId} already part of holdout id: {holdoutId} feature key: {featureKey}.
PART_OF_HOLDOUT_IN_MEG: MEG: User id {userId} is part of holdout: {holdoutId} for feature key: {featureKey}.
HOLDOUT_SKIP_EVALUATION: Skip holdout reevaluation for holdout id : {holdoutName} because {reason}
SAVE_NOT_IN_HOLDOUT: User id: {userId} was not part of any applicable holdout: {holdoutIds}
HOLDOUT_SEGMENTATION_SKIP: Holdout segmentation skipped for holdout: {holdoutGroupName} because segments is null/empty.
USER_EXCLUDED_DUE_TO_HOLDOUT: User {userId} excluded due to holdout group {holdoutGroupName} for feature key: {featureKey}.
USER_NOT_EXCLUDED_DUE_TO_HOLDOUT: User {userId} not excluded due to holdout because no applicable holdout groups matched for feature key: {featureKey}.
